title: A Walk with a Friend
subtitle: Light that has moved from decision into lived pattern
description: An artifact documenting the transition from directional choice to lived pattern. It marks a period of stable recovery, full-spectrum functioning, and the recognition of presence without the need for proof.

motifMap.symbol: A room with a candle in it
motifMap.meaning: Environmental light; no longer just survival but space, movement, and others.
Sequential actions and short lines recording reality without the need to impress.

excerpt: I went to the gym even if I didn’t want to. Even if he wasn’t named he was there.

sourceInputs: Phase Analysis 3.0 — The Candle’s Glow (Embodied Continuity)
